# make-markdown-library

Make Markdown Library creates reproducible AI-readable Markdown libraries from folders, files, and ZIP archives.

Project links:

- Public docs: https://markbeachill.github.io/make-markdown-library/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/markbeachill/make-markdown-library
- Download ZIP: https://github.com/markbeachill/make-markdown-library/archive/refs/heads/main.zip

Primary command:

```bash
make-markdown-library make sources -o markdown-library.md --converter auto
make-markdown-library make sources -o markdown-library.md --backup-existing
```

Useful documentation pages:

- Getting started: https://markbeachill.github.io/make-markdown-library/getting-started/
- CLI reference: https://markbeachill.github.io/make-markdown-library/cli-reference/
- Output reference: https://markbeachill.github.io/make-markdown-library/output-reference/
- Processing rules: https://markbeachill.github.io/make-markdown-library/processing-rules/
- Converter modes: https://markbeachill.github.io/make-markdown-library/guides/converter-modes/
- OCR, PDFs, and images: https://markbeachill.github.io/make-markdown-library/guides/ocr-and-pdfs/
- Markdown folder handling: https://markbeachill.github.io/make-markdown-library/guides/markdown-folders/

Generated outputs:

- markdown-library.md
- markdown-library-manifest.md
- markdown-library.index.json
- markdown-library.index.yaml optional
- markdown-library-files/ optional

Index schema: 1.1. It records source hashes, converter options, fallback metadata, output statistics, complexity metadata, Markdown metadata, and library section offsets.

Safety defaults in 0.3.1 and later:

- make refuses to overwrite existing main outputs unless --overwrite or --backup-existing is set.
- add and rebuild back up existing outputs by default.
- generated manifests, indexes, and split Markdown files are skipped by default.
- normal Markdown files are included directly.
- individual split files do not overwrite user-authored Markdown unless --overwrite-individual is set.
